next_steps: Perform full immunohistochemical panel on biopsy tissue including CD20, CD3, CD68, GFAP, and Ki-67
Obtain fungal, aerobic, anaerobic, and acid-fast bacilli cultures from biopsy tissue
Perform special histochemical stains on biopsy tissue (GMS, AFB, Gram stain)
Consult Infectious Disease regarding empiric coverage for Nocardia given the patient's long-term immunosuppression
Send serum and CSF for autoimmune/paraneoplastic encephalitis antibody panel
Continue systemic corticosteroids at the lowest effective dose for edema management pending definitive diagnosis
Avoid starting empirical chemotherapy or radiation until a definitive diagnosis is established via permanent histology or culture results
